type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: In February 2012, the City of London began using a forcemain to pump landfill leachate (containing residual ammonia) to a nearby City of London wastewater treatment facility. Prior to this, we used to transport this leachate by tanker truck to the Greenway wastewater treatment facility.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Landfill gas collection and flaring increased significantly in 2016 as a result of recent landfill gas wellfield expansions coming on line. It is estimated that the LFG collection efficiency has increased from 48% to 66%. As a result, emissions of combustion byproducts such as CO will increase.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: landfill run-off is a function of annual rainfall

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: leachate is a by-product of landfill operations, and is pumped from the W12A Landfill site to the Greenway WWTP through the leachate force-main for treatment.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The method for estimating the volume of truck traffic at the landfill changed. The new method makes use of truck weigh scale recordkeeping system on the number of trucks entering and leaving the landfill, whereas the old method estimated truck traffic by dividing annual waste deposited by an assumed truck capacity value of 9 tonnes per truck.

comments.comment: The method for estimating the volume of truck traffic at the landfill changed. type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: increased quantity of landfill gas captured and flared

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The latest detailed analysis (i.e., speciation) of raw landfill gas indicated significantly higher levels of hydrogen sulphide compared to previous gas samples taken. As a result, the estimated release of H2S (based on sampled concentrations of raw landfill gas and emission factor estimates for quantities of landfill gas generated by waste-in-place as per the Scholl Canyon model) now exceed the NPRI reporting threshold.

type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report
type.fr: Raison pour laquelle la substance a été ajoutée au rapport

comments.comment: The latest detailed analysis (i.e., speciation) of raw landfill gas indicated significantly higher levels of hydrogen sulphide compared to previous gas samples taken. As a result, the estimated release of H2S (based on sampled concentrations of raw landfill gas and emission factor estimates for quantities of landfill gas generated by waste-in-place as per the Scholl Canyon model) now exceed the NPRI reporting threshold.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: leachate from the landfill site is transported by pipeline to the municipal wastewater treatment system

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Improvements in landfill gas collection system efficiency resulted in larger quantities of landfill gas being flared (CO is a combustion by-product)

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: Hydrogen sulphide is a by-product of the anaerobic decomposition of municipal solid waste in a landfill

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Hydrogen sulphide is a component of landfill gas. H2S concentrations were determined through gas sampling in 2021.

The landfill gas generation estimation model was recently reviewed and updated, resulting in higher values for estimated generation of landfill gas. As a result, estimates of net landfill gas emissions are larger than previously used.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment:
The landfill gas generation estimation model was recently reviewed and updated to include the mass of inert materials disposed in the landfill, resulting in higher values for estimated generation of landfill gas. As a result, estimates of net landfill gas emissions are larger than previously used.

Hydrogen sulphide is a component of landfill gas. H2S concentrations were determined through gas sampling in 2021.

substance.en: Total reduced sulphur (expressed as hydrogen sulphide)
substance.fr: Soufre réduit total (exprimé sous forme de sulfure d’hydrogène)

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: Hydrogen sulphide is a byproduct of the anaerobic decomposition of municipal solid waste

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Fugitive landfill gas emissions are estimated by subtracting the measured volume of landfill gas captured by the LFG collection and flaring system from the estimates total volume of landfill gas generated within the landfill using the Scholl Canyon landfill gas generation model.

Hydrogen sulphide concentrations within landfill gas were measured using gas stream samples from the collection system.

type.en: Reason why substance was added to the report
type.fr: Raison pour laquelle la substance a été ajoutée au rapport

comments.comment: Hydrogen sulphide has been reported previously, but total reduced sulphur had been missed

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Carbon monoxide is a byproduct of combustion of landfill gas in the flaring system and is function of total volume of landfill gas flared in a given year when using the USEPA AP-42 emission factors.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: hydrogen sulphide is a byproduct of anaerobic decomposition of organic waste in landfills

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
Hydrogen sulphide emission estimates are based on the following:
- the net difference between estimates of total landfill gas volume generated from the decomposition of waste (Scholl Canyon model) and the measured volume of landfill gas collected by the landfill gas collection and flaring system
- measured concentrations of H2S in gas samples from the landfill gas collection system

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: ammonia is a component of leachate from the landfill

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The City of London has started to measure H2S concentrations within collected landfill gas on a monthly to provide better estimates of annual H2S releases from fugitive landfill gas emissions (which are determined from the difference between the estimated volume of landfill gas generated and the measured volume of landfill gas collected and flared).
